title: chthamalia ojadapantha
side_effects: Chthamalia ojadapantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use of the plant's extract can also cause gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's leaves or roots can lead to cardiac problems, including palpitations, arrhythmias, and even heart failure. Furthermore, improper handling and preparation of the plant can result in the transfer of toxic compounds to the skin, causing dermatitis and other skin irritations.
